ety: act. part. of جاور 'to become the neighbour of,' &c., iii of جور; but formed from جار jār, 'a neighbour'
def: adj. & s.m. Neighbouring, adjacent; — fixed or confined to a mosque or place of worship (and occupied in prayer and religious meditation), devoutly employed; — a neighbour; — an attendant at a mosque or shrine; one who is constant in prayer and meditation in a mosque; the sweeper of a mosque.
more: n. m. جور being near. An attendant at a Mah. shrine or temple.
(part. act. III. of جور Heb. ) s. m. 1. A neighbour. 2. A sweeper of a mosque, an attendant at a mosque (or other place of worship), one who remains devoutly employed at a mosque or attached to it.

ety: fr. mujāwir, q.v.
def: s.f. Neighbourhood, &c. ( = mujāwarat, q.v.); — the office of attendant at a mosque or shrine.
more: n. f. The office of a mujāvir , q. v.

ety: act. part. of جاوز 'to exceed or transgress' (the proper bound
def: part. adj. Transgressing, exceeding bounds; — immoderate, excessive; (in Gram.) transitive; — s.m. One who transgresses, &c.
more: part. act. (III. of جوز Heb. ) Transgressing, exceeding, bounding.

ety: pass. part. of جوّف 'to make hollow, to hollow out,' ii of جوف 'to be hollow,' &c.
def: part. adj. Hollowed, hollowed out; concave; vaulted; hollow; empty (thing, or place, or fellow), vacant, void; having no heart, cowardly; — wide, spacious, ample.
more: adj. جوق was hollow. Hollow; concave; hollow at the core.

ety: for A. مجوزة mujawwazat, fem. of mujawwaz
def: adj. = mujawwaz, q.v.
adj. 1. Proposed. 2. Decided; determined. 3. Prescribed; laid down. mujavvizān-i-qānūn , A legislature body; legislature; court of legislature; parliament.

ety: act. part. of جوّز 'to cause to pass or be current,' &c., ii of جوز 'to pass,' &c.
def: part. adj. Holding, or proving, to be lawful; allowing to pass, permitting, sanctioning, approving, recommending
more: part. act. (II. of جوز Heb. ) 1. Holding or proving to be lawful. 2. Permitting, allowing to pass, recommending. ¶ mujauwaz, part. pass. Lawful, permitted.
subs: (pass. part. of the same verb), part. adj. Approved, sanctioned; permitted, tolerated; proposed; decided, determined; prescribed; lawful
s.m. A legislative body; legislature, court of legislature; parliament.

ety: pass. part. of اوْجز 'to abbreviate; to epitomize,' &c., iv of وجز 'to be short, or compendious,' &c.'
def: part. adj. Abbreviated; epitomized; compendious; brief; — s.m. An epitome, a compendium, a summary.
more: (part. pass. IV. of وجز) s. m. A summary, compendium, epitome.

ety: pass. part. of جزّأ, ii of (and syn. with
def: part. Divided into parts or portions.
more: (part. pass. II. of جزأ Heb. ) adj. Divided into parts.

pron., a dialec. form of mujhe, q.v.

ety: Prk. gen. मज्झ, or Ap. मज्झु; prob. fr. S. माटृश; or fr. S. मदीय 'mine,' by substitution of Prk. base मह for S. मद्
def: a formative or inflect. base of the pron. maiṅ 'I,' and = ʻme'
subs: 'it has come on me,' 'I am responsible, I am surety' (or I will pay).

def: pron. S. माम् Mujh se us ne aisā kām kīyā . He committed an indecent assault on me. mujh se ; Illit. mijh se ; Rus. matte ; Pr. mutto, maītto, mamādo , To me; from me. mujh meṅ ; Pr. mamammī , In me. mujh meṅ āyā , 1. I am responsible. 2. I am surety for him. 3. I will pay for him. mujhe, mujh ko ; Panj. mai nū ; Rus. man ne, mū ne ; Poet. maīko ; Bhoj. hamrāke . pron. Pr. ahammī . Me; to me. Tū mujh-ko tau maiṅ tujh-ko . Prov. As you treat me so I'll treat you.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Apabhramsa मज्झु (majjhu), from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀫𑀚𑁆𑀛𑀁 (majjhaṃ), from Sanskrit मह्यम् (mahyam). Cognate with Marathi माझे (māj̈he).

def: dative/accusative of مَیں (ma͠i)
pron. obl. (dialec. or rustic) = مجهہ mujh, q.v. a formative or inflect. base of the pron. maiṅ 'I,' and = ʻme'
subs: 'it has come on me,' 'I am responsible, I am surety' (or I will pay).

def: pron. Me, to me. (See مجهـ).
I am thirsty

ety: dialec.
def: pron. Me; to me.

ety: act. part. of اجاب 'to answer; to accept,' &c., ii of جوب 'to make a hole in or through,' &c.
def: part. adj. & s.m. Granting an answer, responding (to), listening (to), granting, consenting (to), accepting, taking well; — one who listens (to), or grants, &c.
more: (part. act. IV. of جوب) Listening to, granting, consenting, taking well.

ety: act. part. of اوْجب 'to render necessary, &c., iv of وجب 'to be necessary,' &c.
def: s.m. Who or what renders necessary or obligatory; cause, motive, reason, account.
more: n. m. Pl. موجبات Cause; reason.
(part. act. IV. of وجب) s. m. Cause, reason, motive, account.

def: s.m. corr. of موجبه mūjiba, q.v.

ety: for A. موجبة mūjibat, fr. mūjib
def: s.m. A thing of great importance (whether good or bad); great virtue or vice (as deserving of reward or punishment in the world to come); — the rewards or punishments of eternity; — (in Logic) an affirmative proposition (opposed to sāliba).
more: n. m. ( Logic .) An affirmative proposition (opp. of sālibā ).
(part. act. fem. IV. of وجب) s. m. 1. A thing of importance (whether good or bad). 2. The rewards or punishments of eternity. 3. (in logick) An affirmative proposition (opposed to سالبه).

def: (Braj.), s.m. pl. of mūjib; and also of mūjiba.
s.m. pl. (of mūjib), Causes, reasons, motives.

ety: act. part. of اوْجد 'to cause to find; to give existence,' &c., iv of وجد 'to discover,' &c.
def: s.m. Causer, cause, author, inventor
more: n. m. وجد discovering. Cause; author ( bānī ). mūjid h. , v. n. To be the cause of. mūjidān-i-qānūn , A legislative assembly; a Parliament.
(part. act. IV. of وجد) s. m. 1. An author, inventor, causer. 2. Corroborating, reinstating (after sickness or poverty).
subs: (-kā), To be the cause, or author (of)
(mūjidān, Pers. pl. of muʼjid), s.m. A legislative body or assembly, a Parliament.

ety: prop. muʼjid, act. part. of آجد 'to corroborate, strengthen,' &c. iv of أجد 'to be robust,' &c.
def: part. adj. Corroborating, strengthening, invigorating; restoring, or reinstating (after sickness, or poverty).
part. act. (IV. of أجر Heb ) Hiring, letting to farm, renting.

direct plural; oblique/vocative singular

oblique plural of مُعْجِزَہ (mu'jiza)

ety: pass. part. of اجمل, 'to collect; to sum up,' &c., iv of جمل 'to collect'
def: part. adj. & s.m. Brought together, collected into a small compass; contracted; abridged; compendious, brief; — confused, requiring explanation; — an abstract, a summary, compendium, a compendious statement or account (of); a confused statement or account (including a number of things requiring explanation)
more: adj. جمل summed up. Abstracted; summary; brief ( ijmālī ). mujmal hisāb . An abstract account.
(part. pass. IV. of جمل) s. m. An abstract, summary, compendium, abridgment. part. Brought together, contracted, abridged.

ety: acc. of mujmal
def: adv. In substance; in the abstract; in brief, summarily, compendiously; cursorily.
more: adv. In the abstract; compendiously; summarily; in short; cursorily.

ety: for A. مجري mujrā, pass. part. of اجري 'to cause to run, or to flow,' iv of جري 'to run; to flow'
def: part. Carried to account or to credit, credited (to); — appointed as an allowance or maintenance; — s.m. That which is carried to the account or credit (of), credit; — that which is appointed as an allowance, maintenance; allowance, premium, deduction; a set-off (against); — obeisance, respects; visit; audience; presentation; presentation of arms (to); — a dirge; — a trial of professional singing
more: n. m. 1. Deduction; allowance; a set-off. 2. A Mah. dirge. 3. Audience; presentation. 4. Obeisance; respects; presenting arms; kissing the hand. 'Lapaṭ jhapaṭ garyāle meṅ nikrī, jāno chhūṭo bāj sikārī ko, Mujro le chūṅdar-vālī ko, mujro le! Rus. song.' She darted on him in the lane as a hawk upon his prey, 'my salutations, pray accept, accept!' 5. A trial of professional singing. Mujrā huā thā yā nāch? mujrā pānā , v. n. To receive credit (for a sum). mujrā-talbī . A counter-claim. mujrā k. , v. a. To wait on one; pay one's respects to; make obeisance; present arms. mujrā k., yā denā , v. a. 1. To allow abatement or deductions. 2. To give credit (for a sum). mujrā lenā , v. n. To deduct; subtract. mujrā h. , v. n. To be deducted, retrenched. mujrā yā chhūṭ chāhnā . To claim a credit or set-off.

(part. pass. IV. of جري lit. Caused to flow, rendered current) s. m. 1. (In Pers. and Hind.) Allowance, premium, deduction. 2. (in Hind.) Obeisance, respects, visit, audience. مجرا کرنا mujrā karnā, To make obeisance, pay respects, wait on, visit. مجريگاه mujre-gāh, Place of visiting, audience, salutation, &c.

v.n. To be carried to account or credit; to be appointed as an allowance, &c.; — to be deducted, to be retrenched
s.i. Place of visiting; audience; salutation.

def: part. adj. & s.m. = mujrā, q.v. part. Carried to account or to credit, credited (to); — appointed as an allowance or maintenance; — s.m. def: s.f. Allowance, deduction; credit given on account; remission (of revenue, &c.), reduction (of assessment).

def: s.m. One who pays his respects, one who waits upon; one who is presented (to); a servant; minister; visitor, &c.; — one who recites a mars̤iya or dirge.
s. m. One who pays his respects; a servant, minister, visitant, &c.
s.f. contrac. of mujrāʼī, q.v.
n. m. 1. Remission of revenue; reduction in the assessment. 2. A credit given on account. 3. One who waits upon or is presented. 4. One who recites the marsiyā or Mah. dirge.

more: n. m. جرم pl. mujrimān . A criminal; delinquent; offender; felon. mujrim ṭhairānā, yā qarār denā . To convict; sentence. mujrim h. , v. n. To commit an offence.
(part. act. IV. of جرم Heb. ) adj. Criminal; (subst.) A sinner.
subs: or mujrim qarār denā (-ko), To prove (one) an offender, &c.; to convict; to sentence
To become a criminal or an offender, to commit an offence.

more: (part. pass. VIII. of جبو or جبي Heb. ) adj. Elected, chosen, elect.

def: part. adj. Striving; laborious, painstaking; — contending (against), waging war (esp. against infidels); — s.m. A superior or superintendent in religious matters, spiritual director, a prelate; — the highest degree to which the learned in (Moḥammadan) law attain; the highest authority in jurisprudence; a jurist (pl. mujtahidīn).
n. m. جـﮩد striving. 1. A superintendent in religious matters; aspiritual director; a prelate. 2. A jurist; the highest authority in Mah. jurisprudence.
more: part. act. (VIII. of جـﮩد) Striving, contending, carrying on war especially against infidels; (subst.) A superiour or superintendent in religious matters, prelate.

ety: mujtahid+Zend āna or ana = S. ana
def: adj. Prelatical; patriarchal; in the manner of a spiritual director.

ety: act. part. of اجتمع 'to become collected, or brought together,' &c., viii of جمع 'to collect,' &c.
def: part. adj. In a state of collection, or congregation, &c.; met or come together, assembled, convened, congregated; — agreeing (or agreed) in opinion; — (a man) who has attained to his full state of manly vigour; — s.m. An assemblage, a body (of persons), a company.
more: (part. act. VIII. of جمع Chald. ) 1. adj. Assembled, convened, together in one place. 2. Agreeing in the same opinion. 3. (A man) arriving at full strength. 4. s. m. An assemblage.

more: (part. act. VIII. of جرم) adj. Guilty.

def: s.m. Facing, standing over against; meeting face to face, confronting; opposing, resisting, contending; — putting side by side, comparing, collating; — presence; opposition, opposite quarter; resistance; encounter, contest; competition; comparison; contrast; comptrol; collation; examination
more: n. m. قبل went before. 1. Opposition. 2. Comparison. 3. Encounter. muqāblah aur imtehān , Check; audit. muqāble par mustaid h . G. G. To resist. muqāblah chāhnā yā k., muqāble ānā , v. n. To challenge; call to combat; defy. muqāblah k. , v. a. 1. To confront; oppose; contend with. 2. To compete or cope with. 3. To compare; collate. 4. To balance; examine; check, compare (accounts, papers, etc.).

(inf. III. of قبل Heb. and Aram. ) s. m. Comparison, collation, competition, opposition, confronting, contest, contending, presence. مقابله کرنا muḳābala karnā, To contend, confront, oppose, emulate, compare, collate. مقابله هونا muḳābala honā, To be in front, to confront, meet, encounter.
subs: (-ke), To come in front (of), to face, confront; to oppose; to challenge to combat, to defy
To be ready or prepared to oppose, or resist, or contend (with)
(-se), To demand or desire to be put face to face (with); to challenge, to defy to combat; to desire comparison, &c.

(-kā, or -se), To confront; to oppose, resist, to contend (with, or against); to compete, or cope (with); — to challenge; — to compare, collate, contrast; to examine, check, or balance (accounts, &c.).

ety: for A. مکابرة mukābarat, inf. n. of کابر 'to lift up; to contend,' iii of کبر 'to be great,' &c.
def: s.m. Pride, haughtiness; — contention.

ety: act. part. of کبّر 'to make, or call, or esteem great; to magnify,' ii of کبر 'to be great'
def: adj. & s.m. Magnifying (God), repeating the formula allāhǒ akbar, 'God is very great'; — one who magnifies (God, by saying allāhǒ akbar).
more: (part. act. II. of کبر) adj. Magnifying; one who magnifies (God, saying الله اکبر).

def: adj. (f. -kī), Opposite, &c.
more: adj. قبل 1. Confronting; opposing; against (اَگے 2, 3). 2. Matching; corresponding; like.
(part. act. III. of قبل Heb. and Aram. ) adj. Opposite, confronting, opposing, matching, resembling, equal, comparing: (postpos. mas.) in opposition, against, for.

ety: pass. part. of قدّم 'to give precedence to; to prefer,' &c., ii of قدم 'to precede,' &c.
def: part. adj. Given precedence; placed before; preferred; — preceding, antecedent, prior; — superior; chief; more important; — s.m. Advanced guard (of an army); — major premiss (of a syllogism); — superior officer of the revenue (in a village), a village head; a chief, leader; — a title of respect among villagers
more: adj. قدم preceding. See pahlā . 1. Antecedent; before. 2. Prior; preceding. 3. Superior; chief. muqqad'dam ; Rus. mukdam , n. m. 1. A village head. 2. A title of respect among villagers. muqaddam jānnā , v. n. To consider preferable. muqaddam h. , v. n. To be first or most binding. tārīkh muqaddam kar-ke likhnā , G. G. H. pahlī mitī ḍālnā yā chaṛhānā , v. n. To antedate.

(part. pass. II. of قدم Heb. and Aram. ) adj. Antecedent, prior, preceding; s. m. The advanced guard, a chief, a leader. مقدم جاننا muḳaddam jānnā, To prefer, to consider preferable (over). مقدم هونا muḳaddam honā, To precede. ¶ maḳdam (noun of place or time) s. m. Arrival.
subs: v.t. To consider preferable (to or over, -par); to deem superior (to), or more important, &c.
v.t. To place before, put first; to give (one, or a thing) preference (over, -par), to prefer
(-par), To stand (before); to precede; to take precedence (of); to be first, or most binding.

def: s.m. The first part; preamble (to a speech); preface (to a book); prelude; introduction; premisses (of an argument); preliminary; — affair, matter, case, business, subject, topic, thesis; — law-suit, suit, cause, case, proceedings; prosecution; — advanced guard (of an army)
more: n. m. قدم going before. 2. Preliminary; preamble; prelude; introduction. 2. Subject ( bāb , 2). Rāt kā muqadmah hai, nihatte na chalo! 3. A law suit; case; proceedings prosecution (دعوي 3). muqadmah banānā, yā uṭhānā , v. a. To get up a case. muqadmā jītnā , v. n. To win a case. muqadmah khaṛā k. , To institute a suit; pursue by law; prosecute; litigate. muqadmah laṛānā , v. a. To go to law; litigate; conduct a suit. maqadmah hārnā , v. n. To lose one's cause.

(part. pass. II. of قدم) s. m. 1. The first part. 2. Preamble, preface, preliminary. 3. Cause (in law). 4. Business. 5. Subject, affair, matter, thesis. مقدمة الجيش muḳaddamatu-l-jaish, The advanced guard of an army. مقدمه فہمي muḳaddama-fahm-ī, s. f. The understanding of the subject or business.
subs: or muqaddama banānā, To get up a case
s.f. The understanding of a case, or business, or subject, &c.
To institute a suit; to prosecute; to go to law (with); to litigate
(-se), To fight a case or cause (with); to go to law (with); to litigate; to prosecute
To lose a cause, or suit, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian مقدمه (muqaddama), from a variant of Arabic مُقَدِّمة (muqaddima).

def: s.m. pl. (of next, q.v.), Preambles, prefaces, premisses, preliminaries; pre-requisites; — law-suits, cases; — topics.
more: s. plur. of مقدمه q. v.

def: adj. Of or relating to a Muqaddam, or chief of a village, &c.; — s.f. The office of a Muqaddam; the dues, or rights, of a Muqaddam.

subs: (act. part. of the same verb), part. adj. & s.m. Decreeing, ordaining, predestining, &c.; — s.m. The Predestinator, God; — the Designer, or Projector, &c.

ety: muqqaish, q.v.+ī = S. इन्+कः
def: adj. Brocaded; worked with gold or silver thread; embroidered.
s.m. (dialec.) = mukkā, q.v. s.m. The fist; — a fist, a blow with the fist; thump, buffet
subs: v.n. The fist to be used; to come to blows
(-ko), To receive a blow with the fist; — to suffer a shock
(-ko), To strike a blow with the fist; to give (one) a buffet.

ety: prob. Prk. मुक्विआ; S. मुष्क+इका
def: s.f. A kind of pigeon (i.q. mūkhī); a pouter (?); — the fist, &c. ( = mukkī, q.v.).
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀫𑀓𑁆𑀔𑀺𑀆 (makkhiā), from Sanskrit मक्षिका (makṣikā). Cognate with Punjabi ਮੱਖੀ (makkhī).

ety: i.q. mukkhī, q.v.; and cf. mukkā
def: s.f. The fist; a fist, blow with the fist; thump, buffet
more: s. f. A blow with the fist, buffet. See مکا mukkā.
subs: To use the fist; to strike with the fist; to deliver a blow; to box
or mukkī lagānā, or mukkī mārnā (-meṅ), To strike with the fist; — to knead (dough) with the fist (i.q. mukkiyānā).

ety: mukkī, q.v.+ā = āw = Prk. आव or आवे = S. आपि (caus. augment)+nā = Prk. अणअं = S. अनीयं
def: v.t. To hit, or thump, or beat, with the fist; — to knead (dough) with the fist.
s.m. (dialec.) = mukkā, q.v. s.m. The fist; — a fist, a blow with the fist; thump, buffet
subs: v.n. The fist to be used; to come to blows
(-ko), To receive a blow with the fist; — to suffer a shock
(-ko), To strike a blow with the fist; to give (one) a buffet.

def: s.m.(?) Bdellium, a fragrant gum (syn. gūgal).
s.m. Bringing home a bride (syn. gaunā, q.v.).
